title: See glimpses of Donald Trump Jr., Bettina Anderson's wedding weekend
shortDescription: Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson were legally married in Florida before holding a ceremony over Memorial Day weekend.

title: Texas runoff election live updates: Polls, races and voter information
shortDescription: Texas voters are casting ballots across the state as the closely watched Cornyn vs. Paxton Republican Senate runoff and other key races unfold.

title: Daily Briefing: A Texas election to watch
shortDescription: A Republican Senate runoff highlights a month packed with elections. Here is the news to know on Tuesday.

title: Texas Republicans decide the Cornyn-Paxton Senate runoff today
shortDescription: Texas Republicans head to the polls today to pick between Sen. John Cornyn and AG Ken Paxton in the bitter U.S. Senate primary runoff.

title: Trump's Paxton endorsement in Texas runoff may haunt him
shortDescription: President Donald Trump abandoning Sen. John Cornyn destabilizes the White House's already-rocky relationship with Senate Republicans.

title: Trump honors US soldiers killed in Iran war, lays wreath at Arlington
shortDescription: The annual holiday commemorating slain service members comes as the Iran war nears the three-month mark and Trump touts progress on a peace deal.

title: Trump participates in Memorial Day ceremony
shortDescription: Trump administration officials attended a Memorial Day wreath laying ceremony at Arlington National Cemetery.

title: Trump's annual Walter Reed physical comes amid health questions
shortDescription: This will be Trump's fourth medical exam during his second term in office, ahead of his 80th birthday on June 14.

title: Trump invested in Eli Lilly. Meanwhile, admin boosted its obesity meds
shortDescription: The disclosure forms bear Trump’s signature. They show seven purchases of Lilly stock made on the president’s behalf through the end of March.

title: Trump touts Iran talks as pressure mounts
shortDescription: President Donald Trump signals progress in Iran war talks while warning of renewed conflict and urging regional nations to join the Abraham Accords.

title: Who is Ken Paxton? Texas attorney general in Senate primary runoff
shortDescription: The Texas AG is aligned with the president's MAGA base.

title: President Trump to participate in Memorial Day observance
shortDescription: President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance are expected to make remarks on Monday, May 25.

title: Trump releases new batch of UFO files
shortDescription: The Defense Department released a new batch of previously classified files on alleged UFO sightings, including references to green orbs and fireballs.

title: Thomas Massie slams Republicans, Trump's ballroom after primary loss
shortDescription: Rep. Thomas Massie, the outgoing Kentucky congressman, bashed his fellow Republicans and Trump's White House ballroom on "Meet the Press."

title: Trump jabs at 'losers' criticizing Iran war peace deal. Updates
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's criticism comes after some conservatives raised concerns that the deal appears to be too favorable to Iran.

title: Alleged gunman killed in White House shooting identified
shortDescription: An armed man was shot and killed by officers May 23 after opening fire near the White House, the U.S. Secret Service said in a statement.

title: Suspect dead, bystander hurt in shooting near White House, Secret Service says
shortDescription: The gunman "pulled a weapon from his bag and began firing," according to the Secret Service statement. Officers returned fire, killing the suspect.
